title: alpinia gracilis
intro: Alpinia gracilis, also known as Lesser Galangal or Thai Galangal, is a type of plant in the ginger family that is native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alpinia gracilis include reducing fever, relieving nausea and digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties to protect against cell damage. Alpinia gracilis is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, powder, and oil, and is also used in cooking and as an ingredient in traditional remedies.
